message.content:
# Detailed Analysis of Didi Conductor Navigation Settings Screen

## 1. Screen Purpose
This screen is part of the Didi Conductor (driver) app's navigation settings configuration interface. It allows drivers to select their preferred navigation application and configure automatic navigation preferences for ride-hailing trips.

## 2. UI Layout Patterns
The screen follows a standard mobile app settings layout with three distinct sections:

- **Top Bar**: Contains navigation and title elements
- **Content Area**: Main settings options with radio buttons and toggles
- **Bottom Area**: Configuration section with a toggle switch

## 3. Color Scheme
- **Primary Colors**: White background with black text
- **Secondary Colors**: Light gray section dividers
- **Accent Colors**: Blue checkmark for selected option, black toggle switch
- **Background**: Clean white background throughout

## 4. Key Components and Their Placement

### Top Bar:
- **Back Arrow Icon**: Black left-facing arrow in the top-left corner for navigation
- **Title Text**: "Navegación" (Navigation) in bold black text centered at the top

### Content Area:
- **Section Header**: "App de navegación" (Navigation App) in bold black text
- **First Option**: 
  - "Navegación de Uber" (Uber Navigation)
  - Subtext: "Sugerencia: Quedate en la app" (Suggestion: Stay in the app)
  - Blue checkmark icon on the right indicating selection
- **Second Option**: 
  - "Google Maps"
  - Subtext: "Se abre en otra app" (Opens in another app)
- **Third Option**: 
  - "Waze"
  - Subtext: "Se abre en otra app" (Opens in another app)

### Bottom Section:
- **Section Header**: "Configuración de navegación" (Navigation Configuration) in bold black text
- **Toggle Setting**: 
  - "Navegación automática" (Automatic Navigation)
  - Subtext: "Se mostrará la vista general de la ruta antes de que se inicie la navegación automáticamente" (The general route view will be shown before automatic navigation starts)
  - Black circular toggle switch (appears to be in the ON position)

## 5. User Flow State
The user is currently in the navigation settings configuration screen of the Didi Conductor app. They can see that "Navegación de Uber" is currently selected as their preferred navigation method (indicated by the blue checkmark). The automatic navigation feature appears to be enabled (toggle switch is in the ON position). The user has the option to switch to Google Maps or Waze as alternative navigation apps, though these would open in separate applications rather than within the Didi app. This screen is part of the driver's app configuration process, allowing them to customize how navigation works during rides.
